name: Canada Silver Cobalt Works Inc.
summary: Canada Silver Cobalt Works Inc. engages in the acquisition, evaluation, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. It primarily explores for silver, cobalt, nickel, gold, and copper deposits. The company's flagship property is the castle mine covering 19 claims, 34 leases, and two licenses located in Ontario. It also has interests in 39,200 hectares of EV properties located in Quebec and Ontario. The company was formerly known as Canada Cobalt Works Inc. and changed its name to Canada Silver Cobalt Works Inc. in May 2020. Canada Silver Cobalt Works Inc. was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Coquitlam, Canada.
